description: Unit test suite for the Bootstrap Popover component, testing its API, behavior, and integration with jQuery.

classes.name: Popover
classes.description: Main class for Bootstrap's Popover component, providing methods for showing, hiding, toggling, and configuring popovers.

methods.name: getInstance
methods.description: Static method to retrieve the existing Popover instance associated with a DOM element.

methods.name: getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Static method to retrieve the existing Popover instance or create a new one with optional configuration.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Instance method to display the popover.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Instance method to hide the popover.

methods.name: toggle
methods.description: Instance method to toggle the visibility of the popover.

methods.name: setContent
methods.description: Instance method to set the content of the popover.
